NOTES: Primary grip maintenance. Mirrors Meso 2 W4 deload shape (3x6'' @ RPE 6). Target ≈80% of Meso 2 W2 working load (W2 was 18.5 kg @ RPE 8.5 clean). RPE manda — if RPE 6 feels too light add ~1 kg, do NOT push above RPE 7. Clean static pull, fingers active, shoulders engaged, no DIP collapse. Goal: dissipate Meso 2 residual fatigue without losing AMRAP adaptations.

NOTES: Secondary grip maintenance. Target ≈80% of Meso 2 W2 working load (W2 was 23.5 kg and reported 'leggero' = sub-RPE 8.5). Same deload shape as 20 mm. Thumb wrapped, scapulae engaged. RPE manda — cap at RPE 7. NO back three, NO pinches, NO repeaters, NO AMRAP this week.

NOTES: Light forearm flush + finger flexor/extensor stretch. Wed travel + Thu indoor (technical, low pump) follows — leave the session fresh, not flushed.

NOTES: Secondary grip — re-establish Meso 2 W2 baseline (working ≈23.5 kg, reported 'leggero' last meso → likely true RPE 8 on 23.5 kg). RPE manda: target 23-25 kg to hit a clean RPE 8.5. Thumb wrapped, scapulae engaged. Same set scheme as 20 mm for symmetry.

NOTES: Reference test — +25 kg fixed across the meso for comparability. Meso 2 W2 baseline = 12''. Expect 11-13'' fresh. If <10'' flag it: would mean post-Meso 2 detraining or insufficient recovery from the W1 deload. Single AMRAP set, give it everything.

DAY: Mon (Principale — max hang + svase + AMRAP test)
NOTES: Light forearm flush + finger flexor/extensor stretch.

NOTES: [INTENSIFY] Static peak of the meso. Slight intensity bump vs W2 working: target ≈+1 kg (~19.5-20 kg rif.) if W2 came clean at RPE 8.5, OR keep W2 kg and push to RPE 9. Volume −1 set vs W2 (5→4) to allow the intensity bump. RPE manda — if 20 kg comes <RPE 9, go to 21 kg but NOT above. Recuperi completi; stacco pulito, niente strappi. NOTES: Reference test — +25 kg fixed. Meso 2 W3 = 11''; W2 of this meso = baseline data point. NOTES: [SEND WINDOW DELOAD] Volume ~−40% vs W3 working (W3 = 4 sets → here 3 sets, shorter hangs). Carico rif. ≈80% of W3 working (~16-17 kg if W3 landed at 20 kg).
